events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes spool erection & fit-up work that is rough-complete, with a specific defect: flange bolt-hole rotation wrong (two-holing missed). This is a non-compliant condition per ASME B31.3 and project iso drawings. Two-holing is a standard piping practice where bolt holes on flanges are oriented so they straddle the centerline (no bolt hole directly on top centerline). Missing this means the flange orientation is wrong.

This is a defect that needs rework. The work is roughly 70% complete until defects are corrected. Since it's non-compliant, decision should be "fail."

Let me construct the JSON.
